PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JUPITER ENTERPRISES,INC., A CALIF CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GREAT WALL CONTRACTORS, INC., A CALIF CORPORATION $17,972.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,972.00, ON THE CROSS COMPLAINT GREAT WALL RECOVER FROM JUPITER ENTERPRISES $500.00. EACH PARTY SHALL BEAR THEIR OWN COST OF SUIT.
